---
title: "Minh-Tuong Nguyen"
sortby: "Nguyen, Minh-Tuong"
subtitle: "PhD Student (VinUni)"
image: nguyenminh_tuong.jpg
toc: false
started: "Mar. 2023"
ended: "Current"
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../people.html">People</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Graduate Students</li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

:::{#person-profile}
:::

## Biography
Minh-Tuong Nguyen has been pursuing the Collaborative Doctoral Research Degree Program between VinUniversity and the University of Technology Sydney since 2023. His research interests include mobile edge computing, physical-layer security, secrecy outage probability, computational algebraic geometry, and resource allocation in wireless communications.

## Education

- [VinUniversity]{.fw-bold} | Hanoi, Vietnam<br />
  Ph.D. in Computer Science | 2023-2027

- [University of Ulsan]{.fw-bold} | South Korea<br />
  M.S. in Electrical Engineering | 2019-2021

- [Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology]{.fw-bold} | Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam<br />
  B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering| 2012-2016
